name: Salmon Frittata
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the salmon.
2. Spray a 9 x 13-inch baking pan with non-stick vegetable coating.
3. Combine the flaked salmon with the remaining ingredients in the prepared baking pan.
4. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes, or until the frittata is set.
